creator: ale@FreeBSD.org
text:
Pav Lucistnik ha scritto:
> I'd like to have ale@'s opinion on this first.

Well, I don't like very much the port (that could have been repocopied 
from mysql51, keeping current patches and client/server layout), but 
from a bsd.database.mk point of view I think the patch can go in.

-- 
Alex Dupre
